Description About This Product Bring Mid-Century Modern texture and character to your living room with this fluted coffee table. Vertical groove fluting runs across the full front panels — adding handcrafted depth and warmth to a clean, low-profile silhouette that anchors any seating arrangement. At just 18" tall, the solid apron base sits close to the ground, pairing naturally with sectionals and low sofas alike. The generous rectangular surface holds trays, books, plants, and everyday living room essentials with ease. Crafted from engineered wood, easy to assemble with included hardware, and simple to wipe clean. Features Spacious Storage i

Bring Mid-Century Modern texture and character to your living room with this fluted coffee table. Vertical groove fluting runs across the full front panels — adding handcrafted depth and warmth to a clean, low-profile silhouette that anchors any seating arrangement. At just 18" tall, the solid apron base sits close to the ground, pairing naturally with sectionals and low sofas alike. The generous rectangular surface holds trays, books, plants, and everyday living room essentials with ease. Crafted from engineered wood, easy to assemble with included hardware, and simple to wipe clean.

Features Spacious Storage includes four drawers to keep essentials like remotes and magazines organized. Durable Build crafted from P2-grade engineered wood with a waterproof surface for easy cleaning. Multi-Functional Design works as a coffee table, TV stand, or end table—ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or home offices. The coffee table support up to 120 lbs for enhanced stability. Quick & Easy Assembly includes step-by-step instructions and hardware for fast, hassle-free setup.
